self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can classify Runtime follow-up stubs more truthfully when the host read-model uses canonical current-head resolution instead of raw filename presence.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adopted slice retains one resolver-backed stale-status rule for Runtime handoff stubs.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, the handoff list still marked historical Runtime follow-up artifacts as pending-review work after the live case head moved downstream.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The handoff list will stop overstating pending review work while preserving real pending-review stubs.

decision.rationale: The slice is small, user-visible, and directly aligned with the current stale-status bottleneck.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
